alt: Wild Indian peacock foraging on the ground in natural habitat
caption: Peacocks are omnivores, pecking at seeds, berries, insects, and small reptiles as they walk through forests and grasslands.
attributionText: Photo by This picture was realized by Richard Bartz by using a Canon EF 70-300mm f/4-5.6 IS USM Lens via Wikimedia Commons, CC BY-SA 2.5
